project_context.audience: People seeking spiritual help, healing, protection, exorcism (non-denominational)

headings.usage_rules: Use for all H1-H4. Tracking tight for large headings, tracking wide for small overlines. Never use Inter or sans-serif for headings.

body.usage_rules: Use for body copy, paragraphs, and form inputs to maintain the manuscript feel.

accents.usage_rules: Use for small caps, buttons, and navigation links. Provides a monumental, engraved stone look.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Asymmetric editorial layouts. Avoid centered 'SaaS' card grids. Use negative space generously to create breathing room and reverence.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris Grid) but adapted for editorial style. Mix tall and wide blocks. Overlapping elements to simulate pages of a manuscript.
layout_and_spacing.borders: 1px solid rgba(212, 175, 55, 0.2). Use sharp corners (rounded-none). No pill-shaped buttons; use sharp rectangles.

hero.structure: Split or asymmetrical layout. Large illuminated initial letter. Dark background with glowing candlelit overlay.
hero.animations: Subtle flicker animation on gold accents (opacity pulse). Slow fade-in of text.

cards.style: Glassmorphism with heavily saturated dark background (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40). 1px gold-tinted border.
cards.hover: Slight lift, border glows slightly brighter gold. No heavy drop shadows; use inner glows.

buttons.primary: Flat dark bordeaux (#5E1914) or transparent with solid gold (#D4AF37) border. Text in gold.
buttons.hover: Background fills with gold/10, text brightens, subtle gold inner glow.

navigation.style: Sticky, glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#08090C]/80). Border bottom 1px gold/10.

motion_and_interaction.micro_interactions: Candle flicker effect on hover (opacity oscillating between 0.8 and 1).
motion_and_interaction.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. Subtle parallax on ancient manuscript textures in the background.

images.description: Dark macro shot of a candle for the hero section background, evoking a sacred atmosphere.
Weathered parchment texture. Use as a fixed background layer with mix-blend-overlay and very low opacity (5%) to give the whole site a subtle manuscript feel.
Rustic stone archway casting dramatic shadows. Use for the 'Bibliothèque' (Library) or 'À propos' section backgrounds, darkened aggressively.

media.treatment: Images must be darkened and overlaid with #08090C to blend seamlessly into the dark theme. Never use raw bright images.

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on role.

strict_forbidden: Inter, Roboto, or generic sans-serif fonts for headings.
Emoji icons. Use Lucide icons strictly, or custom SVG sacred symbols.
instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize Tailwind config with the provided color palette and fonts (Cormorant Garamond, EB Garamond, Cinzel). Provide imports from Google Fonts.
Use Lucide-React for icons, sizing them elegantly (stroke-width: 1.5).
Build standard Shadcn components but override borders to 0px or 1px sharp, removing standard rounded-md in favor of rounded-none.
Set up Stripe integration for the 'Dons / Offrandes' page.
Set up Claude Sonnet 4.5 integration for the AI Prayer Generator feature.
Set up Resend for email notifications (prayer requests, auth).
Implement the authentication and member dashboard with premium content gating.
Ensure all user-facing text is in French.
